seo.title: Work With Me | Krisada.com
seo.description: A single, scoped site audit. I review your digital system and tell you exactly what's broken, what's working, and what to fix first. $497. One deliverable. No retainer.

main_entity.name: Site Audit
main_entity.description: A written audit reviewing content architecture, AI visibility gaps, search signal analysis, internal linking, and prioritised next steps for your digital presence.
